summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO-focused fabric layer. All backend SEO endpoints working (16/16 tests pass). Admin SEO Manager at /admin/seo fully functional with fabric selection, SEO preview alerts, Generate SEO button, meta field editing, and content block management. Fabric Detail Page shows all SEO content sections correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/seo/fabric/{id} - returns SEO content for fabric (200)
GET /api/seo/fabric/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent fabric
GET /api/seo/fabric/{id}/preview - returns SEO preview with alerts
GET /api/seo/fabric/{id}/related - returns related fabrics list
POST /api/seo/fabric/{id}/generate - generates all SEO blocks with AI (GPT-4o)
POST /api/seo/fabric/{id}/regenerate-block - regenerates H1 block
POST /api/seo/fabric/{id}/regenerate-block - regenerates meta_title
POST /api/seo/fabric/{id}/regenerate-block - returns 400 for invalid block
PUT /api/seo/fabric/{id} - updates SEO content
POST /api/seo/batch-generate-slugs - generates slugs for all fabrics
SEO content quality validation (meta title, description, intro word count)
Admin SEO page loads at /admin/seo
Admin can select fabric and view SEO preview alerts
Generate SEO button creates H1, intro, meta tags, FAQ, bulk details, why_fabric
Fabric detail page shows SEO H1 (data-testid='fabric-h1')
Fabric detail page shows SEO intro (data-testid='seo-intro')
Fabric detail page shows Bulk Order Details section (data-testid='bulk-details')
Fabric detail page shows 'Why This Fabric' bullets (data-testid='why-fabric')
Fabric detail page shows FAQ section (data-testid='faq-section')
Fabric detail page shows Related Fabrics (data-testid='related-fabrics')
Fabric detail page shows Applications section (data-testid='seo-applications')
Schema markup (Breadcrumb, Product, FAQ) generated client-side via react-helmet-async
critical_code_review_comments: Schema markup is generated client-side via react-helmet-async. For better SEO crawling, consider SSR or pre-rendering for schema markup, though current implementation is standard for React SPAs.
seed_data_creation: SEO content generated for fabric ID 8e6c6e09-f711-455b-9900-1044574d7c25 (Cotton Denim 3/1RHT DE-1671)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO layer fully implemented: 1) Backend seo_router.py with 8 endpoints for CRUD, generation, preview, related fabrics 2) Frontend AdminFabricSEO.js at /admin/seo for content management 3) FabricDetailPage.js renders all SEO blocks with proper data-testids. AI generation uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key (working, not mocked).
